data.title: Hero kills

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Cyclops is countered by Lancelot due to Lancelot's high mobility and immunity frames. Lancelot can easily dodge Cyclops's skills with his "Puncture" and "Phantom Execution," making it difficult for Cyclops to land his damage. Additionally, Lancelot's burst damage can quickly eliminate Cyclops, who is relatively squishy and lacks escape skills. Lancelot's ability to dive in and out of fights makes him a strong counter against Cyclops in both laning and team fight scenarios.

counters.counter_desc: Cyclops synergizes well with Atlas due to Atlas's crowd control abilities. Atlas can initiate with his "Fatal Links" and "Perfect Match" skills, pulling enemies into a specific area. This allows Cyclops to unleash his full damage potential with his skills, especially his ultimate, "Star Power Lockdown," which can easily hit and lock down multiple enemies caught by Atlas. The combination of Atlas's crowd control and Cyclops's burst damage makes them a formidable duo in team fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: Team fight

emblems.emblem_desc: I chose the Mage Emblem with Temporal Reign for Cyclops because it greatly enhances his cooldown reduction and skill spam potential. Cyclops already benefits from reduced cooldowns through his passive, and Temporal Reign makes his skills refresh even faster after using his Ultimate.
The "Temporal Reign" talent reduces the cooldown of other active skills by 1.5 times for 4 seconds after casting an ultimate. This can be very useful for heroes who:

equips.equip_desc: This build appears to be focused on magic damage, cooldown reduction, and sustain for a mage-type hero. Let's break down each item and its purpose:

hero.hero_overview: Cyclops is a mage hero known for his strong burst damage and low cooldown skills. He excels at poking enemies from a safe distance and locking down targets with his ultimate. Thanks to his passive, his skill cooldowns reduce whenever his abilities hit enemies, allowing him to spam skills in fights. He is commonly played in the mid lane and can also be effective in jungle
hero.hero_strength: His ultimate can chase and immobilize enemies.
hero.hero_weakness: Assassins can dodge his skills.

data.recommend: This guide provides a comprehensive overview of Cyclops, covering his skills, builds, emblem setups, and gameplay strategies. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced player, this guide will help

spell.spell_desc:
I chose Flicker for Cyclops because he is a squishy mage with no natural escape skill. Flicker gives him instant mobility, allowing him to reposition, escape from assassins, or chase low-HP enemies safely


Tips:Use Flicker immediately when assassins dive you to create distance and survive.

counters.counter_desc: If Guinevere jump at cyclops then stun him, it's game over, Guinevere stun is by far the most annoying thing that could've happen, the only way to escape Guinevere skills quickly is by flickering, but if your flicker is still on cool down then try bursting to cancel her skills quickly.

dominants.dominant_desc: If Cyclops has his burst the first thing you do is burst at an enemy and just stay focused on that enemy, once you hit burst you use Cyclops Skill 2 then when Skill 2 last planet fired you use skill one to give another attack, if your magic power is high this should instantly kill the enemy, if the enemy flickered away try chasing them with flicker then Skill one.

emblems.emblem_desc: The cool down helps your skills have even more lesser time to wait! The speed boost is helpful when you are trying to run from an enemy or trying to go save your teammates from being ganged up, the Brave smite how ever will help you recover health quickly, by using you skills and actually hitting an enemy, not only will his passive activate but also Brave smite, which means he's healing while he fight.

equips.equip_desc: Each Equipment play each role, the only thing you need to focus on cyclops is his damage, the more magic power he has the better damage he give, the Oracle and Blood wings are for survivability, and I mainly bought them in the end or when I really need it!

hero.hero_overview: Cyclops is a character who's good when it comes to crowed control, He may be small/short but fear him because when his burst is released your hero will meet it's end! Because they get trapped in a magical cage then Cyclops teammates, can just finish it.
hero.hero_strength: Cyclops first skill {Stardusk Shock} Cyclops casts two Stardust Disks, hitting an enemy gives them a quarter percentage of damage, his second skill {Planets Attack}, Cyclops conjures five Starlit Spheres around himself, when an enemy hero is nearby, the planets shoots themselves to the targeted enemy dealing massive damage! There's also cyclops passive where if you hit an enemy each time with his skills, all his skill cooldowns are reduced by 0.5s.
hero.hero_weakness: Cyclops is very fragile, altho it depends on your build, but typically, he's not ment for close up fights, the longer the distance his attack the better damage, plus its best for safety precautions, rushing to a fight filled with close range hero could be though especially if the opposing side has Guinevere as their here, the stun is annoying, canceling your skills whenever you get stunned.

spell.spell_desc: Use flicker just in case you get dragged in by close range hero's, and it will also help you escape whenever a team fight is happening, and for safe distance.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Cyclops works well with Badang because Badang can lock enemies in place using his crowd control skills. This allows Cyclops to easily land his Ultimate and deal continuous magic damage. Badang also acts as a frontliner, protecting Cyclops while he stays at the back and deals damage safely.

counters.counter_desc: Cyclops has an advantage against Lunox because of his low cooldown skills and reliable crowd control. His Ultimate can lock Lunox in place, preventing her from freely switching modes or escaping during fights. With proper positioning and timing, Cyclops can pressure Lunox and burst her down before she deals sustained damage.

dominants.dominant_desc: During the mid to late game, Cyclops excels at dealing continuous magic damage in team fights. Stay behind the frontliners and poke enemies using your low cooldown skills. Use your Ultimate to lock down priority targets or secure kills on fleeing enemies. Proper positioning is important since Cyclops has low mobility and durability.

hero.hero_overview: Cyclops is a Mage hero with high sustained magic damage and very low cooldown skills. He excels at poking enemies, controlling fights with crowd control, and dealing consistent damage in team fights.

Requires good positioning to be effective.

spell.spell_desc: Flame Shot shoots a fireball in a straight line, dealing magic damage and knocking enemies back. It deals higher damage to enemies with low HP, making it useful for finishing kills or pushing enemies away.

you cannot kill gloo, but gloo can pick you off easily and bring you to his team or just solokill you with his ult.

Ling is rarely picked in rank because he is weaker than most assassins. 
However if you are versus a Ling in rank you just ult him and he will be an easy kill during lord fight or turtle fight. Plus he can't fight you easily once you have your ultimate and your core items, you can actually solokill him.
This is a skill matchup, if the gusion is faster than you, then you are an easy kill for him, but if you can use ult on gusion before he completes his combo you can kill him easily.

you are weaker early but will be stronger later in the game, as long as you don't get hit by her stun you can fight and solokill her easily.
you can hit her with your skills if she tries to clear minions with melee form.

you are both weak early but cecilion has more range and less cooldown than you so be careful of his skills. save s2 to help you dodge his claws.
do not interact in lane, just fast clear mid and rotate

her passive bounce makes her win lane and clear faster than you. also be careful of her stun because she can solokill you easily with her ult.
do not interact in lane, just fast clear mid and rotate

try your best to kill his spawn for extra gold and exp, if you can do it you will get a gold and exp lead easily.
save your skills to kill his spawn if needed.
if he uses ult then just run away, he is easy to kill when he doesn't have ult

Lunox is stronger than you early game and can freeze you out of lane and solokill you with dark form ult.
go for last hits only. Once you have concentrated you can solokill her if she doesn't have a big gold and item lead.

dodge his skills as best as you can, he cannot freeze you out of lane but he has more impact early and can clear lane fast so fast clear as well so that you can rotate if needed. Stay away from your minions, let him choose between hitting you or the minions with her skills.

dodge her skills, most pharsa want to clear lane fast and rotate to jungle or sidelane, Stay away from your minions, let her choose between hitting you or the minions with her skills, also fast clear the lane so you can rotate as well.
Novaria really can't interact with you in lane, she just wants to use skills 1 and 2 on minions to fast clear and then rotate, just dodge her s2 and fast clear the lane so you can rotate as well

another big counter to cyclops, her s1 has very low cooldown and low mana cost so she can repeatedly poke you until you are low health and need to recall and miss gold and xp from minions. just stay back and last hit with skills.
Good to ban when playing as 5 man.

stronger than you early game, stay away from your minions, be careful of her passive pull. she wil want to clear mid fast to rotate, let her clear and then clear the lane when she's done so you can rotate as well
ping sidelanes when she is missing, she can just ult and tp to bushes for easy kills.

do not fight him if you can, just stay away from your minions and focus on clearing minions. be careful when he has dash, h can dash to you and use s1 for big poke damage. do not fight him 1v1 when he has ult, you are very likely to lose especially if you don't have items yet. Once you have Concentrated + Vengeance you can solokill him as long as he doesn't have a big gold and item lead.

stay behind minions, do your best to stay out of her range as much as possible, be careful when she has full passive, she can poke you out of lane easily. let her clear first if needed just to stay safe and just clear after. once you have vengeance and ult you can solokill her if she is careless and gets too close to you.

skill matchup, valir is a good matchup, just stay behind your minions so he can't hit you and focus on clearing lane. if you can dodge his fireballs you can solokill him easily with ult.

Faramis is rarely picked and even more rarely seen in the midlane. just dodge his s2 and save your s2 so that you can run away when he tries to pull you with ghost form.  He doesn't have much damage, you can easily win a  1v1 vs a faramis.

very strong early, can poke you out of lane with s1-s2-s2-s1, do not fight early, just focus on playing safe and getting last hits on minions. once you have talisman and spellvamp you can fight and win the 1v1 vs valentina (use vengeance if needed).

skill matchup, bring vengeance. he is stronger than you in the early game. do not fight before lvl 4, just focus on clearing minions and then rotate. once you have talisman and spellvamp you can fight and win the 1v1 easily vs harley (use vengeance if needed).

dominants.dominant_desc:
- always take skill 1 at the start of the game, throw 1 skill at jungler's start buff and go to lane.
-play safe, if needed just go for last hits and let enemy midlaner clear first then clear under tower.
-your priority is to get level 4, if enemy is already done clearing mid and is now missing warn and ping your side laners of the missing mid (and roam)
-recall around 1:30 and return to lane before 1:45 so that you have full hp and mana and return to clear mid and get lvl 4 for the 1st turtle.
-once you are lvl 4 you can fast clear and rotate.
dominants.dominant_title: EARLY GAME - Game start to 4 mins

dominants.dominant_desc:
-once you get Talisman and Concentrated, you are now strong at this stage and can win most 1v1s with anyone (but don't fight enemies with more gold and items than you)
-help take objectives, fast clear mid and rotate to sidelanes or jungle
-if you are ahead, group with roam and rotate together, and look for objectives and fight weaker enemies to increase gold lead.
-if you are behind, focus farming, catch side waves and recall to base if enemies are missing on the map.
-be there when your team is taking lord and use your ult on either the tank, the jungler, or anyone from the enemy team that steps too close to your team and focus them with your skills and kill them quickly.

-same as midgame, but you become stronger and tankier the more you get items. 
- be very careful as death timers are long and if you die before lord respawn the enemy can take lord easily with numbers advantage.
-cyclops is actually a carry, not an initiator or a crowd control hero, so play safe and stay behind your tank and let your tank enter bush first.
-remember, your only contribution to teamfights is your damage, so staying alive is the most important in the late game. you need to learn to space well between enemies so that you can deal damage but not so close that you get collapsed and picked off.

emblems.emblem_desc:
- best emblem for Cyclops imo. provides big boost to your magic damage in the early game, where you are at your weakest.
- you can go for other emblems like basic emblem, assasin emblem or even fighter emblem but the mage emblem gives you the best distribution of stats and without it you won't deal as much damage as possible early.
Use if you want sustain early game and heal damage taken in lane. Lesser damage potential for extra tankiness and sustain.
For players who are new to playing Cyclops and can't manage his mana properly. Lesser damage potential but safer lane and can help you rotate to other lanes instead of recalling for mana.

equips.equip_desc:
ALWAYS BUY 1 MAGIC NECKLACE AS 1ST ITEM, THEN RUSH BOOTS AND TALISMAN.
If the enemy tank builds Radiant Armor early then buy Divine Glaive first before buying Wishing Lantern.

ALWAYS BUY 1 MAGIC NECKLACE AS 1ST ITEM, THEN RUSH BOOTS AND TALISMAN.
After buying Concentrated Energy, if the enemy tank already has Radiant Armor then buy Divine Glaive first before buying Wishing Lantern.

Empty item slot is for a defense item vs the enemy with most threat to you, or if the enemy has multiple heroes with the same type of damage (e.g. vs Karina, Pharsa, Natan - Athena; Lance, YZ and Brody - Cuirass). If your team is leading, you can buy the defense item earlier to avoid getting shutdown, if your team is behind in gold build your damage items first as you will need all the damage you can have to match the enemy damage.
Swap Glowing Wand for Divine Glaive if there is no strong sustain (heal, spellvamp or shield)  heroes in the enemy team

hero.hero_overview: Cyclops is my one-trick champion, and as a purely solo queue player with consistent high winrates of above 65-70% in ranked and can reach mythic solo easily in around 45-55 matches with over 80% winrate, this champion is actually more difficult to play the higher you climb in rank, so pick meta heroes like meta slaves if you want to have less stress in rank, but if you want to suffer with me, then read the rest of the guide. Also, drop a like on the guide, you won't find a guide in this website as good and detailed as this guide.
hero.hero_strength:
- fast skill cooldown and consistent magic damage, cannot really burst but have more damage to offer than other meta mages during teamfights.
-very fast ult cooldown, if you see anyone step up too close to you, especially tanks and fighters in lord dance don't be afraid to use ult on them and poke their health down so they are forced to teamfight with reduced health.
-surprisingly tanky for a mage with consistent spellvamp heal with concentrated energy very well, once you get the item you don't need to recall for health.
-can win those risky 1v1s with fighters, assassins and marksmans (with the right items, vengeance spell up and micro)
hero.hero_weakness:
-no dash or escape skill, movement bonus in s2 is not enough to escape danger so good positioning is a must
-you are just a big minion until you get enchanted talisman, so play very safe early game and focus on getting lvl 4.
-super weak early, loses to most meta mages in lane and may cause you to get zoned out of your minions and get gapped in xp and gold.
-cannot really assist with early invades as you have low damage and very long cooldowns early game.
-very mana-hungry early game and may need to recall just to get health and mana up while your enemy midlaner rotates to sidelanes or jungle.
-short-range skills, needs to get closer to enemy than most mages to deal damage and be at risk of getting collapsed on and bursted down.
-cannot build glowing wand as 1st item, so sustain, strong in early game champions can snowball the game and end before you can get online

data.recommend: UPDATED 03/14/2026 - MADE BY A PLAYER WITH 65-75% WINRATE IN SOLO RANK

spell.spell_desc:
Why Vengeance?
Helps you tank and survive burst from main threats, and win 1v1s or even 1v2s and 1v3s when well fed. You can argue that Flicker or Purify is better, but as long as your positioning is good and you have good awareness of your main threats, you'll be alright without Flicker.

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on cooldown reduction, sustained magic damage, and survivability for Cyclops. Demon Boots and Enchanted Talisman solve mana and cooldown issues, allowing constant skill spam. Concentrated Energy provides spell vamp for sustain during fights, while Holy Crystal greatly increases magic damage in mid to late game. Brute Force Breastplate adds mobility and defense to help Cyclops survive dives, and Ice Queen Wand enhances crowd control by slowing enemies, making it easier to chase or escape.

hero.hero_overview: Cyclops is a small but powerful one-eyed mage who controls the power of stars and planets. Despite his size, he deals constant magic damage and is known for his very low skill cooldowns.
hero.hero_strength:
Very short cooldowns on skills
Strong poke damage in lane
Excellent single-target lock with Ultimate
Easy to use for beginners
Scales well into late game 🌌
hero.hero_weakness:
No dash or blink skill
Squishy (low defense & HP)
Vulnerable to assassins and crowd control

spell.spell_desc:
Why Sprint is good for Cyclops
Helps Cyclops escape since he has no dash
Lets you chase enemies while using Skill 2 (Planets Attack)
Prevents enemies from slowing you (very useful vs tanks & fighters)
When to use Sprint
Running away from assassins (e.g., Hayabusa, Lancelot)
Chasing low-HP enemies after using Ultimate
Repositioning during team fights

data.title: Cyclops

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is highly compatible with Cyclops because his crowd control can group and lock enemies in place, allowing Cyclops to safely cast his skills and land his ultimate during team fights.

counters.counter_desc: Gusion is a strong counter to Cyclops due to his high burst damage and mobility, which allow him to quickly reach and eliminate Cyclops before he can react.

dominants.dominant_desc: Always maintain proper positioning and stay behind your frontline during fights. Use Cyclops skills to poke enemies and wait for the right moment to lock down key targets with your ultimate. Avoid overextending, as Cyclops is vulnerable when caught alone.

emblems.emblem_desc: Impure Rage is ideal for Cyclops because it increases his skill damage and helps restore mana. Since Cyclops relies on frequent skill usage, this emblem improves his poke damage and sustain during the early to mid game.

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on cooldown reduction, sustain, and survivability for Cyclops. Magic Boots and Enchanted Talisman allow frequent skill usage, while Concentrated Energy provides damage and healing. Queens Wings and Brute Force increase durability against burst damage. Divine Glaive ensures Cyclops can still deal strong damage to tank enemies in the late game.

hero.hero_overview: Cyclops is a powerful Mage hero in Mobile Legends who specializes in continuous magic damage and crowd control. Known as the Starsoul Magician, he uses cosmic energy to attack enemies from a safe distance. Cyclops excels in the mid lane where he can farm quickly and rotate to help other lanes. His skills have short cooldowns, allowing him to spam abilities and pressure enemies constantly. With proper positioning and timing, Cyclops can control fights, chase enemies, and secure kills using his locking ultimate skill.
hero.hero_strength: Cyclops has very strong sustained magic damage due to his low skill cooldowns and passive ability that reduces cooldown further. He is effective in the early to mid game, where he can dominate lanes and assist teammates through frequent rotations. His ultimate skill can lock onto enemies, making him excellent for catching mobile heroes and setting up kills. Cyclops performs well in team fights by dealing continuous damage from the backline while controlling enemy movement. His range, poke potential, and reliable crowd control make him a strong mage when protected by teammates.
hero.hero_weakness: Cyclops is very vulnerable to burst damage because he has low health and limited escape skills. Once enemy assassins or fighters get close to him, he can be eliminated quickly. He relies heavily on proper positioning and team protection, especially during team fights. Cyclops is also weak against heroes with strong crowd control or silence, as they can stop him from casting skills. In the late game, if he falls behind in gold or is frequently targeted, his impact can be reduced significantly.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker helps Cyclops escape dangerous situations and reposition during fights. Since he lacks mobility and is easily targeted, Flicker improves his survivability and allows him to safely cast skills or avoid enemy burst damage.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early: Priority purple buff, you don't need to pick between orange or purple it depends on your roamer but I prioritize purple buff in early game and go to orange buff after. With the help of river you don't need to worry about where to start just provide back-ups in lanes... 
Cyclops is very squishy that's why he needs the roam to help him against the turtle so it will be better to have a teammate (s)to help you Contest the turtle 

Mid game: this is where cyclops starts to shine he can burst down enemies using sky piercer or magic items by this advantage you can ambush heroes that are squishy like marksman 

Late game: in the late game you need to be careful with cyclops since he's probably going to be the main target of the enemies jungler and roamer by this information you can spam skills to enemies like spamming your ultimate skill and then use other skills whether it hits minions, creeps or enemies just a thing that will make it the cool down reset so he can spam his ulti, becarefull of being aggressive cyclops are still very squishy but he can be used for tank build jungle or mage too, it depends on you

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Наличие Хилоса в команде даёт циклопу чувствовать себя комфортно и наносить урон постоянно.

counters.counter_desc: Лолита сильно мешает циклопу реализоваться, так как отражает все его способности

dominants.dominant_desc: На ранней стадии, играя в лесу, старайтесь избегать сражений и как можно быстрее вы фармить свои ключевые предметы, но всегда поддерживайте свою команду если противники наступают.
В поздней стадии игры всегда держите дистанцию и будьте на чеку, не стоит допускать врага к себе, впереди вас всегда должен быть танк, который сможет принять урон.

emblems.emblem_desc: Данный набор эмблем включает в себя мобильность, магический вампиризм и приятный урон от возгорания. Что позволяет циклопу чувствовать себя комфортно в сражениях. Хорошо подходит для игры в миду.
Данный набор эмблем включает в себя возможность быстро забирать объекты и иметь более приятную перезарядку способностей. Хорошо подходит для игры в лесу.

equips.equip_desc: Данная сборка даёт циклопу в первую очередь мобильность и хорошее магическое проникновение, что позволяет легко справляться с танками. Хорошо подходит для игры в лесу и центральной линии.
Данная сборка, даёт циклопу, быстро забирать объекты, не теряя свою мобильность, что даёт преимущество в поздней игре, держать верх над соперниками. Хорошо подходит для игры в лесу.

hero.hero_overview: Маг с хорошим количеством урона, мобильный и имеет приятную дистанцию способностей, отлично подходит для игры в лесу и средней линии.
hero.hero_strength: Быстро набирает обороты в лесу, начиная бой с ультимативной способности, способен удержать врага на расстоянии и сократив дистанцию своим вторым навыком легко справляется со своими соперниками.
hero.hero_weakness: Персонаж очень хорошо раскрывает свой потенциал в поздней игре, и нуждается в приобретении первых ключевых 3х предметов, после чего чувствует себя комфортно.

data.recommend: Рекомендован специально тем, кто хочет побеждать.

spell.spell_desc: После появления черепахи или лорда, позволяет легко справляться с ними и не отдать их сопернику.

Emblem fighter akan sangat membantu untuk bisa bertahan di dalam pertandingan karena menambah 10% tambah spell vamp. 

-Agility
Menambah 4% movement speed membuat lebih cepat berotasi ke xp lane dan juga gold lane. 

-Festival of blood.
Memberi tambahan 6% spell vamp dan aka bertambah sering bertambah nya kill atau assist. Setiap satu kill atau assist akan menambah kan 0,5% spell vamp yang bisa di stak 8X.

-Temporal regin. 
Mengurangi CD skill 1 dan 2 sebayak 1,5 detik dan ber efek 4 detik.
